title: Weapons Of Legends
description: Weapons Of Legends Adds Difficult Dungeons, Insane Boss fights, and Insane Items.
body:
Weapons Of Legends Is a Mod that adds various structures and difficult dungeons, Insane Boss Fights, Insane Items, 3 Unique biomes and a whole new dimension, and a wide variety of mobs.

This mod's Bosses and greatly inspired By Stick War.

Are you sure you have what it takes to defeat them in battle? Do not Undermine them!


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
